name: Zero Trust posture push (ZTNA / IdP enforcement plane)
description: Outbound (action) connector: pushes the XORCISM device-trust feed (GET /api/zero-trust/device-trust) to your enforcement plane — a ZTNA / IdP / PEP device-posture endpoint (Cloudflare Access, Zscaler, Microsoft Entra Conditional Access, Okta or a custom PDP) — so access decisions can gate on the XORCISM-computed device trust. Reads the feed from a `file` (the exported JSON), an inline `feed`, or builds a demo feed; shapes the payload per target (generic | cloudflare | zscaler | okta | entra); only the devices below `min_trust` (the non-compliant set) are pushed. With no webhook (or dry_run) it returns the built payload WITHOUT sending. Config: ZT_POSTURE_WEBHOOK / ZT_POSTURE_TOKEN (or pass `webhook` / `token`). Does NOT read or write the database.

parameters.name: format
parameters.help: generic | cloudflare | zscaler | okta | entra — shapes the per-device payload

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path to the exported device-trust JSON (GET /api/zero-trust/device-trust). A demo feed is used if omitted.

parameters.name: min_trust
parameters.help: Push only devices with trust below this threshold (the non-compliant set); 0 = push all

parameters.name: token
parameters.help: Bearer/API token for the webhook (overrides ZT_POSTURE_TOKEN)

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.help: Build the payload but do not send it (returns the payload)
